# XoggAI

XoggAI is an intent router for x402 APIs. Agents send natural-language intents to `/intent`; XoggAI embeds the intent, searches registered x402 endpoints, reranks candidates, and optionally executes the selected endpoint through x402 payment.

Public mode is dry-run first. `Connect Agent` means connecting an existing agent to XoggAI routing, not deploying a new agent or making XoggAI subsidize the caller's API payments.

## API

Production base URL: https://xoggai-backend.onrender.com

- `GET /health`
- `GET /intent?q=<intent>&budget=0.05&dry=true`
- `GET /search?q=<query>&limit=10&dry=true`
- `GET /api/stats`
- `GET /api/feed`
- `GET /api/endpoints`

Use `dry=true` for route selection without upstream execution or payment.
Public terminal commands include `health`, `stats`, `endpoints`, `search <query>`, `route <intent>`, `docs`, `openapi`, and `clear`.
